tests.test_body:
define i1 @one_bit(i1 %a, i1 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @one_bit(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[MUL:%.*]] = mul nuw i1 [[A:%.*]], [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[MUL]]
  %mul = mul i1 %a, %b
  ret i1 %mul
}

issue.title: [CorrelatedPropagation] Miscompile: opt -passes=correlated-propagation produces unexpected UB on simple IR test
issue.body:
This bug was found by Azul FuzzGen IR test generator and verified by alive2 tool.

See reproducer at: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/8-bvRS

Source code:
```ll
; ModuleID = 'bugpoint-reduced-simplified.bc'
source_filename = "gen_01564"
target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"
target triple = "x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: readwrite)
declare void @llvm.assume(i1 noundef) #0

define void @function_0(i64 %val_i64_6) {
entry_1:
  %val_i1_28 = icmp ule i64 %val_i64_6, undef
  %val_i1_33 = mul i1 %val_i1_28, %val_i1_28
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %val_i1_33)
  ret void
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: readwrite) }
```
alive2 output:
```ll

----------------------------------------
define void @function_0(i64 %val_i64_6) {
%entry_1:
  %val_i1_28 = icmp ule i64 %val_i64_6, undef
  %val_i1_33 = mul i1 %val_i1_28, %val_i1_28
  assume i1 %val_i1_33
  ret void
}
=>
define void @function_0(i64 %val_i64_6) {
%entry_1:
  %val_i1_28 = icmp ule i64 %val_i64_6, undef
  %val_i1_33 = mul nsw nuw i1 %val_i1_28, %val_i1_28
  assume i1 %val_i1_33
  ret void
}
Transformation doesn't verify!

ERROR: Source is more defined than target

Example:
i64 %val_i64_6 = #x0000000000000000 (0)

Source:
i1 %val_i1_28 = #x1 (1)
i1 %val_i1_33 = #x1 (1)

Target:
i1 %val_i1_28 = #x1 (1)
i1 %val_i1_33 = poison
void = UB triggered!


Summary:
  0 correct transformations
  1 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
```
How to reproduce:
Run opt with `-passes=correlated-propagation`:
```shell
opt -S -passes=correlated-propagation source.ll 2>&1 >target.ll
```
Run alive2:
```shell
alive-tv source.ll target.ll
```
issue.author: nrinskaya

comments.author: nikic
comments.body:
Simpler reproducer (https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/bkBZRS):

```
define i1 @test(i1 %a, i1 %b) {
  %mul = mul i1 %a, %b
  ret i1 %mul
}
```

Probably a bug in `nsw` inference for the 1 bit special case.
